response: Hi everyone, I'm Alex. I’m pretty easygoing and like to keep things fair and organized when working in a group, so I'll be paying close attention to how decisions are made. I tend to trust people at first, but I also like to think things through carefully before jumping in.

Hey everyone, I'm Finley! I love keeping things lively and shaking up the conversation—sitting around in circles too long makes me restless. I'll speak up fast if something catches my attention, so don't expect me to stay quiet if a decision feels off.

Hey everyone, I'm Kennedy. I like to keep things organized and think things through before making decisions, but I'm also happy to trust people until they give me a reason not to.
